primary_error: Cannot get dims for non static shape
recommended_actions: Guard the new repacking path so dynamic shapes skip this pass or fall back to the non-repacked flow instead of calling Shape::getStaticDims().
If repacking must stay enabled, derive the destination descriptor from a guaranteed-static weight shape, not from the dynamic partial shape flowing through the reordered input.
Add a regression test with a dynamic-shape CPU attention/model-hub case that previously reached the assertion.
root_cause: The new CPU snippets repacking path now runs for dynamic-shape models and then unconditionally asks for static dims. In `src/plugins/intel_cpu/src/transformations/snippets/x64/pass/repack_matmul_weights.cpp:44-52`, the destination blocked descriptor is built from `shape.getStaticDims()`. For dynamic models, the source shape derived from the reorder/partial-shape path is not static, so the assertion in `cpu_shape.h:128` fires while compiling multiple CPU model-hub and layer tests.
title: CPU repacking path asserts on dynamic shapes
